summary: Frontend-only testing completed for dark mode compatibility, redirect routes, and product variant features. All 7 features tested and passed successfully.

1_about_us_dark_mode.details: About Us page (/about-us) renders correctly in dark mode. All sections have proper dark:bg-slate-800 classes for white backgrounds, and text uses dark:text-gray-300 or dark:text-gray-400 for readability.

2_csr_redirect.details: /csr correctly redirects to home page with #csr anchor. URL becomes /#csr after redirect. CSR section element (#csr) found on page.

3_contact_redirect.details: /contact correctly redirects to home page with #contact anchor. URL becomes /#contact after redirect. Contact section element (#contact) found on page.

4_size_variant_hover.details: Size variant buttons (e.g., 50g, 200g) show different product images on hover. Label 'Select Size (hover to preview, click to add)' guides user. Gallery icon indicator visible on sizes with images.

5_size_variant_click_adds_to_cart.details: Clicking size variant button adds product to cart with that size. Size buttons have data-testid='size-{productId}-{size}' format (e.g., 'size-kesar-chandan-50g'). Cart badge updates to show items.

6_quantity_controls.details: Quantity +/- buttons work correctly for each product. data-testid='qty-increase-{productId}' and 'qty-decrease-{productId}' format. Quantity can be increased and decreased (min 1, max 99).

7_added_to_cart_confirmation.details: Two forms of confirmation appear: 1) Inline green 'Added to cart!' message on product card (with pulse animation), 2) Toast notification 'Kesar Chandan added to cart!' at bottom-right. Both visible for ~2 seconds.

critical_code_review_comments: AboutUs.jsx has proper dark mode support with dark:bg-slate-800 and dark:text-gray-300/400 classes
App.js correctly implements redirect routes using Navigate component: /csr -> /#csr, /contact -> /#contact, /about -> /about-us
FragranceGrid.jsx has comprehensive product variant functionality: hover preview, click to add, quantity controls
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Cart integration works seamlessly with toast notifications via sonner
seed_data_creation: None required - tested with existing product data in mockData.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: All dark mode, redirect, and product variant features are working correctly. Product IDs use slug format (e.g., 'kesar-chandan', 'regal-rose', 'oriental-oudh', 'bold-bakhoor') not numeric IDs. Size buttons use format size-{slug}-{size}, quantity buttons use qty-increase-{slug} and qty-decrease-{slug}. 4 products available with 2-3 size options each.
